name: This Afternoon
detailedForecast: Rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms and patchy fog before 5pm, then rain likely and patchy fog and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 60. South wind around 16 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
